Class ScanDsl

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl.ScanDsl
public final class ScanDsl extends Object
Fluent builder for BLE scan operations.

Obtained via BrickDsl.scan(). The typical usage is: 

dsl.scan()
   .forLegoHubs()          // filter by LEGO hub GATT service UUID
   .timeoutSeconds(10)     // stop automatically after 10 s
   .first()                // take only the first discovered device
   .thenConnect();         // connect and return a ConnectionDsl

Thread safety: instances of this class are not thread-safe and must not be shared across threads.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull List<BleDevice>
    collect(int count)
    Starts a scan and blocks until count devices have been discovered or the configured timeout elapses, then stops the scan.
    @NonNull DeviceDsl
    first()
    Starts a scan and blocks until the first device is discovered, then stops the scan.
    @NonNull ScanDsl
    forBuWizz2()
    Restricts the scan to BuWizz 2.0 peripherals using the Application service UUID.
    @NonNull ScanDsl
    forBuWizz3()
    Restricts the scan to BuWizz 3.0 peripherals using the Application service UUID.

    forCircuitCubes()
    Restricts the scan to peripherals advertising the Circuit Cubes NUS service.
    @NonNull ScanDsl

    Restricts the scan to peripherals advertising the LEGO Hub GATT service.

    Restricts the scan to peripherals advertising the SBrick Remote Control GATT service.

    Stops the scan automatically after the given number of seconds.

  • Method Details

    • forLegoHubs

      public @NonNull ScanDsl forLegoHubs()
      Restricts the scan to peripherals advertising the LEGO Hub GATT service.

      Sets the service UUID filter to LegoProtocolConstants.HUB_SERVICE_UUID.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • forSBricks

      public @NonNull ScanDsl forSBricks()
      Restricts the scan to peripherals advertising the SBrick Remote Control GATT service.

      Sets the service UUID filter to SBrickProtocolConstants.REMOTE_CONTROL_SERVICE_UUID.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • forCircuitCubes

      public @NonNull ScanDsl forCircuitCubes()
      Restricts the scan to peripherals advertising the Circuit Cubes NUS service.

      Sets the service UUID filter to CircuitCubesProtocolConstants.NUS_SERVICE_UUID.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • forBuWizz2

      public @NonNull ScanDsl forBuWizz2()
      Restricts the scan to BuWizz 2.0 peripherals using the Application service UUID.

      Sets the service UUID filter to BuWizz2ProtocolConstants.APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • forBuWizz3

      public @NonNull ScanDsl forBuWizz3()
      Restricts the scan to BuWizz 3.0 peripherals using the Application service UUID.

      Sets the service UUID filter to BuWizz3ProtocolConstants.APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • forService

      public @NonNull ScanDsl forService(@Nullable String uuid)
      Applies a custom GATT service UUID filter.

      Pass null to scan without any service UUID filter.

      Parameters:
      uuid - 128-bit UUID string, or null for no filter
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • timeoutSeconds

      public @NonNull ScanDsl timeoutSeconds(long seconds)
      Stops the scan automatically after the given number of seconds.

      A value of 0 (the default) means the scan runs until BleScanner.stopScan() is called explicitly or until first() / collect(int) receives enough devices.

      Parameters:
      seconds - scan duration in seconds; must be ≥ 0
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if seconds is negative

    • first

      public @NonNull DeviceDsl first() throws BleException
      Starts a scan and blocks until the first device is discovered, then stops the scan.

      If a timeout was set via timeoutSeconds(long) and no device is found within that period, this method completes exceptionally with a BleException.

      Returns:
      a DeviceDsl wrapping the first discovered device; never null
      Throws:
      BleException - if the scan fails or times out without finding a device

    • collect

      public @NonNull List<BleDevice> collect(int count) throws BleException
      Starts a scan and blocks until count devices have been discovered or the configured timeout elapses, then stops the scan.
      Parameters:
      count - the number of devices to collect; must be ≥ 1
      Returns:
      an immutable list of at most count discovered devices; never null
      Throws:
      BleException - if the scan cannot be started or if it times out before count devices are found
      IllegalArgumentException - if count is less than 1
